series_metadata.series_description: Includes documents related to obtaining and maintaining a DHS-sponsored Security Clearance, in furthermore of the DHS Classified National Security Information (CNSI) Program, administered by the STACC/SAIC. Documents include but not limited to the nomination forms, supporting documents (e.g. fingerprints, eAPP, SF 312) HSDN access and PINS, and self-reporting documentation (e.g. changes in personal status, foreign contacts, foreign travel).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office files throughout length of individual's security clearance ( max initial issuance, followed by max each renewal/Periodic Review ; Electronic: in OHS network drive throughout length of individual's security clearance ( max initial issuance, followed by max each renewal/Periodic Review)
